title: New ClawHub skill: agent-logger — know when your agent is sick
content:
Point agent-logger at a log file or directory and get a structured health report: error lines, warning counts, suspected token spikes, and a HEALTHY/DEGRADED/UNHEALTHY verdict. Stdlib, offline.

  python agent_logger.py scan <logfile|dir>

Free + MIT. Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee. ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-logger
